recent_excerpts: A California man received a 63-month prison sentence for laundering cryptocurrency stolen by a cybercriminal ring that defrauded victims of approximately $260 million.
U.S. Treasury sanctioned Cambodian Senator Ly Yong Phat over alleged ties to human trafficking and cyberscam compounds.
